od_description: Magarmal Bagh / Jehangir Chowk (central Srinagar) ↔ Narbal (Budgam, on Gulmarg Road) via Qamarwari.
stops_verdict: Qamarwari stop well-corroborated (669 visits) though corridor support is thin (2 drivers). Endpoints clear.
narrative: Clean match: FDR-455 'Narbal to Jehangir Chowk' at 1.0 overlap with exact endpoint names (Magarmal Bagh ≈ Jehangir Chowk; Narbal). Several regional routes (Srinagar→Shanglipora/Aboora/Baderkote) also show 1.0 because they run through Narbal, but they continue 26-43 km further; the observed corridor ends at Narbal (14.3 km ≈ FDR-455's 17 km), so FDR-455 is correct. Support thin (6 runs / 2 drivers) but the geometric+name match is unambiguous. Narbal is in Budgam district = IN the study area (stale OUT_OF_AREA tag corrected).
evidence_used: geocoded endpoints: Magarmal Bagh≈Jehangir Chowk (A), Narbal (B, Budgam), Qamarwari (mid)
FDR-455 'Narbal to Jehangir Chowk' = 1.0 overlap + exact endpoint match; observed ends at Narbal (not the longer regional routes)
data_quality_flags: thin support (2 drivers) — but match is unambiguous (1.0 overlap + name)
script verdict OUT_OF_AREA is wrong; Narbal (Budgam) is in the study area
